overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit dystopian city. The player transitions between street level and subway stations, moving through crowds under massive overpasses and past towering buildings with bright holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza transitioning to subway descent

events.description: approaching and entering subway stairwell descending underground
entering darker underground corridor with blue ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking across plaza and descending stairs into subway station

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near railing looking at phone

entered.detail: green and orange automated vending machine with glowing product display
tall pole with bright white light cutting through fog
concrete stairs with red metal railings leading downward
covered walkway with blue neon strip lighting and concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy neon-lit plaza at night. The camera approaches a subway entrance with red railings and descends into an underground corridor illuminated by blue neon lights. A vending machine stands prominently on the right as the player character enters the station.

events.description: exiting subway station back to street level
crossing the street with a group of pedestrians at crosswalk

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs from subway and crossing the street with pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt crossing the street ahead
dark sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
large vertical screen displaying political campaign advertisement

segments.scene_description: The player exits the subway station and emerges onto a busy street corner. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians, passing a blue 'Ellison' street sign and large digital billboards. A car drives through the intersection as the crowd moves across the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath massive concrete overpass

tilting camera upward to view tall building with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk beneath massive concrete overpass through thick fog

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive curved concrete structure spanning overhead with support pillars
tall building facade with large red hexagonal neon logo
tropical trees visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass, the scene is bathed in orange-tinted fog with neon lights reflecting off the haze. The camera passes under the curved structure while pedestrians walk ahead. The player looks up at a towering building with a bright red hexagonal neon sign piercing through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with subway entrance and tall commercial buildings

events.description: waiting at crosswalk then crossing street with green walk signal
approaching subway entrance with ascending stairs

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and approaching subway entrance with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and black jacket walking toward camera
sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading upward into building entrance with blue lighting
high-rise building with illuminated glass windows and vertical neon accents
pedestrian signal showing green walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a wide intersection toward a subway entrance, passing a green traffic light and the 'Ellison' street sign now on the left. A tall glass building with vertical red neon dominates the left side. Pedestrians move in both directions as the camera approaches the stairs leading up into the station.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway station interior with multi-level stairwells

events.description: entering subway station and beginning ascent of stairs
continuing ascent through crowded stairwell with opposing pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs in crowded subway station alongside pedestrians moving in both directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket ascending stairs ahead of camera
pedestrian in white crop top descending stairs in opposite direction

entered.detail: enclosed concrete stairwell with metal railings and overhead fluorescent lighting
upper level walkway with orange ambient lighting visible at top of stairs
long fluorescent tube lights mounted on walls and ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters the subway station and ascends a wide concrete stairwell. Fluorescent lights illuminate the concrete walls as pedestrians move up and down the stairs. The upper level glows with orange ambient light at the top of the stairs, with metal railings lining the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched dystopian city, transitioning from the depths of a subway station to the hazy streets above before descending back into the transit system. It begins in a foggy plaza, descending through a blue-lit underground corridor past a vending machine before emerging onto a bustling street corner. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath digital billboards, the environment shifts into a dense, orange-tinted fog beneath a massive concrete overpass, where a towering red hexagonal sign pierces the haze. The scene then opens across a wide intersection dominated by a glass skyscraper with vertical red neon, passing a green traffic light and street signage. Finally, the camera turns toward a subway entrance and ascends a wide concrete stairwell, moving from fluorescent underground lighting toward a glowing orange ambient light at the top.
